pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies this path
Task description explicitly specifies this path
Task description requires at least 60 trials
Task description strictly enumerates these uppercase consonants

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic 2-back working memory experiment. The required experiment file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/nback_task.psyexp and the conditions file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/nback_conditions.csv. The task requires a minimum of 60 trials with a target rate between 20% and 40%. The required valid stimuli are exactly the 20 uppercase consonants (BCDFGHJKLMNPQRSTVWXZ). All metadata parameters correctly reflect the explicitly stated task requirements and constraints.
